title: Joint Probability Distribution for Two Discrete Random Variables
description: A visual representation of a joint probability distribution table showing the probability of each combination of outcomes for two discrete random variables X and Y.
elements: Random Variable X (with outcomes x₁, x₂...)
Random Variable Y (with outcomes y₁, y₂...)
Joint Probability P(X=xᵢ, Y=yⱼ) for each cell
relationships: The joint probabilities are displayed in a grid where rows represent outcomes of Y and columns represent outcomes of X
The marginal probability for a specific outcome of X is the sum of the joint probabilities in its column
The marginal probability for a specific outcome of Y is the sum of the joint probabilities in its row
